title: Crosshair Indicator
description: When looking at an entity or a player, the crosshair changes color.
body:
# Crosshair Indicator When looking at an **entity or a player**, the crosshair changes color.
Customizable shape, size, color, etc. via the in-game config (Cloth Config API). [![License: MIT][license-badge-image]][license-badge-link] [![Download on Modrinth][download-badge-image]][download-badge-link] [![Source: Codeberg][source-badge-image]][source-badge-link] --- ## Features - Highlighted crosshair when looking at an entity or a player
- Size increases when looking at a target (customizable) - Fully client-side - In-game config - Customizable Shape, Size, Color, etc.
[license-badge-image]: https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-d5393e?style=for-the-badge [license-badge-link]: https://mit-license.org/ [download-badge-image]: https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-Modrinth-1BD96A?style=for-the-badge [download-badge-link]: https://modrinth.com/mod/crosshairindicator/ [source-badge-image]: https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-Codeberg-4793cc?style=for-the-badge [source-badge-link]: https://codeberg.org/r1sk00/crosshair-indicator/
